hooks.command: INPUT=$(cat); EXT="$(printf '%s' "$INPUT" | jq -r '.cwd // "."')/extension"; [ -d "$EXT" ] || exit 0; NEED=0; [ -f "$EXT/dist/content.js" ] || NEED=1; [ -n "$(find "$EXT/src" -newer "$EXT/dist/content.js" 2>/dev/null | head -1)" ] && NEED=1; [ "$NEED" = 1 ] || exit 0; if ( cd "$EXT" && npm run build ) >/tmp/fp-autobuild.log 2>&1; then printf '{"systemMessage":"\ud83d\udd28 Auto-rebuilt extension/dist \u2014 reload the unpacked extension + hard-refresh CB to see changes"}'; else printf '{"systemMessage":"\u26a0\ufe0f Auto-build FAILED \u2014 see /tmp/fp-autobuild.log"}'; fi; exit 0
